---
title: "Projects"
output: html_document
hidedate: true
hiderelated: true
hidediscus: true
---

Check out some of my coding projects below:

<i class="fa fa-file"></i> &nbsp; [The Food System of Bahrian: Analyzing Risks and Possibilities](/project/bahrain/)

<i class="fa fa-signal"></i> &nbsp; [Wrangling & Exploratory Data Analysis](/project/project1/)

<i class="fa fa-line-chart"></i> &nbsp; [Modeling, Inference, Prediction](/project/project2/)

<iframe src="/bahrain.pdf" width="100%" height="800" border="0"></iframe>



<!--
<i class="fa fa-pie-chart"></i> 
<i class="fa fa-tasks"></i> 
-->
